name: actng
description: ActNG: an AI-native actuarial reserving workbench

scripts.dev: npm run seed --workspace @actng/server -- --if-empty && concurrently -n server,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @actng/server" "npm run dev --workspace @actng/web"
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @actng/core && npm run test --workspace @actng/server
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @actng/core && npm run build --workspace @actng/server && npm run build --workspace @actng/web
